market: Global stock markets downturn due to West Asia geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices
Sensex fell over 1,400 points, Nifty50 dropped below 22,250
Banking and auto sectors face significant pressure
art: Han Ishu and yang02 won the 6th Tokyo Contemporary Art Award (TCAA) 2026
Major exhibitions opening: 'Celebrity Skin' (Tate Modern), 'The Jamaica Project' (Camden Art Centre)
Art market trend: Renewed commitment to human-made work over AI-perfection
Growing appreciation for texture and dimension in contemporary painting
